testcase.name: test_get_subscription_tiers

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'subscription_tiers' in {'ranked_tiers': {'bronze': {'color': '#CD7F32', 'icon': '#x1F949', 'max_rating': 999, 'min_rating': 0, ...}, 'diamond': {'color': '#B9F2FF', 'icon': '#x1F4A0', 'max_rating': 2999, 'min_rating': 2500, ...}, 'gold': {'color': '#FFD700', 'icon': '#x1F947', 'max_rating': 1999, 'min_rating': 1500, ...}, 'master': {'color': '#9932CC', 'icon': '#x1F451', 'max_rating': 99999, 'min_rating': 3000, ...}, ...}, 'tiers': {'basic': {'bonus_streak_multiplier': 1.25, 'can_create_tournaments': False, 'daily_bl_bonus': 100, 'daily_mint_limit': 20, ...}, 'free': {'bonus_streak_multiplier': 1.0, 'can_create_tournaments': False, 'daily_bl_bonus': 0, 'daily_mint_limit': 3, ...}, 'premium': {'bonus_streak_multiplier': 1.5, 'can_create_tournaments': True, 'daily_bl_bonus': 300, 'daily_mint_limit': 50, ...}}}

testcase.name: test_get_ranked_leaderboard
testcase.failure: tests/test_push_ai_subscription_iteration32.py:174: in test_get_ranked_leaderboard assert "leaderboard" in data E AssertionError: assert 'leaderboard' in [{'rank': 1, 'rating': 1000, 'season_games': 0, 'season_wins': 0, ...}]

testcase.name: test_get_ranked_leaderboard_with_limit
testcase.failure: tests/test_push_ai_subscription_iteration32.py:184: in test_get_ranked_leaderboard_with_limit assert "leaderboard" in data E AssertionError: assert 'leaderboard' in [{'rank': 1, 'rating': 1000, 'season_games': 0, 'season_wins': 0, ...}]

testcase.name: test_get_my_subscription
test_get_marketplace_listings

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'listings' in [{'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'used', 'created_at': '2026-01-10T05:47:04.558560+00:00', 'description': 'Created via AI Listing Creator test', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'used', 'created_at': '2026-01-10T05:45:42.317859+00:00', 'description': 'Created via AI Listing Creator test', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'new', 'created_at': '2026-01-08T08:36:47.662430+00:00', 'description': 'This is a test listing created by automated testing', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'like_new', 'created_at': '2026-01-06T17:33:00.851913+00:00', 'description': 'Like new condition', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'new', 'created_at': '2026-01-06T17:28:28.294077+00:00', 'description': 'This is a test listing created by automated testing', ...}]

testcase.name: test_get_tournaments
testcase.failure: tests/test_push_ai_subscription_iteration32.py:367: in test_get_tournaments assert "tournaments" in data E AssertionError: assert 'tournaments' in []
